name: Fasting-mimicking diet aging risk-factor randomized trial
summary: A randomized crossover clinical trial testing three monthly five-day fasting-mimicking diet cycles against unrestricted diet monitoring in generally healthy adults, including IGF-1 and metabolic risk-factor endpoints.
population: Generally healthy adults in the United States

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Caloric Restriction Mimetics and Insulin and IGF Axis Modulation because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers and safety in Generally healthy adults in the United States. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
